validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: cd apps/web && npx vitest run GoalSettingsModal.test --run && cd ../.. && cd apps/api && npx vitest run home.router.test --run && cd ../.. && cd packages/validators && npx vitest run home.test --run && cd ../.. && cd apps/web && npx vitest run AuthenticatedHomePage.test --run

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Users can set daily goal type (revenue/calls/meetings/tasks) and target
definition_of_done_items.evidence: GoalSettingsModal.tsx RadioGroup with 5 types + target value input; updateDailyGoal mutation saves to User.preferences
home.router.ts:601-608 writes {type, targetValue, label, customUnit} to User.preferences.dailyGoal using read-merge-write pattern
home.router.ts:485 reads User.preferences.dailyGoal with Zod safeParse, falls back to revenue/$5000
244 tests across 4 suites: GoalSettingsModal (14), home.router (79), validators (74), AuthenticatedHomePage (77)

notes: PG-156 was pre-implemented by IFC-195 (Completed 2026-02-28). Validation-only execution confirmed all 4 acceptance criteria met. All coverage thresholds exceeded: GoalSettingsModal 100%/95%/100%/100%, home.router 96%/90%/100%/96%, validators 100%/100%/100%/100%. 244 total tests pass across 4 scoped test suites. Pre-existing lint errors (6) in unrelated files do not affect PG-156 scope.
